A ritualized "capture" takes place as three-to-four-foot-tall Martians emerge from the incubator. Women and youths form a gauntlet to collect the newly hatched beings. The scene highlights the communal, non-parental nature of their upbringing.
Quiet anticipation around the incubator enclosure as eggs begin to crack.
The hatchlings are successfully collected by the gauntlet, completing the ritual.
Hatchlings emerge from eggs and are caught by a moving line of women and youths.
